name: Roy Bargy
abstract: Roy Fredrick Bargy (July 31, 1894 – January 16, 1974) was an American composer and pianist.

works.t: Second Rhapsody for Piano and Orchestra

concerts.label: Paul Whiteman and His All American Band

about_quotes.speaker: Bud Freeman
about_quotes.evidence: I joined a little band in the Whiteman band... in the band were Jack Teagarden... Frank Trumbauer... Carl Kress guitar and it seems to me the pianist was Roy Bargy from time to time.

about_quotes.speaker: Edwin "Squirrel" Ashcraft
about_quotes.evidence: I think I knew him. And the Benson Orchestra, if you remember, had, uh, Roy Bargy in it.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gallodoro
about_quotes.evidence: Roy Bargy was the piano, conductor and arranger. He was great. He was a great man.
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Gallodoro interviewed by Monk Rowe, Oneonta, New York, December 28, 2005

about_quotes.speaker: Cliff Leeman
about_quotes.evidence: And Roy Bargy, Bix Beiderbecke, the Casaloma Band started there about 1932
